# Benjamin Ghajiga — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> Benjamin Ghajiga is a versatile and accomplished Full-Stack Web Developer, Web3 Developer, and Video Editor based in Abuja, Nigeria, with 4+ years of experience delivering impactful digital solutions. He blends technical depth — spanning React, Node.js, Algorand, Cardano, and Solidity — with creative production skills in Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, and DaVinci Resolve. A hackathon winner (2025 Model and I Hackathon) and funded project contributor (Secuda on Cardano), Benjamin has a strong track record of taking products from concept to launch for startups, NGOs, and Web3 ecosystems. His brand communicates innovation, versatility, and a bold creative-technical identity.

---

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://benjamin-ghajiga-08d3f479.zappy5.app/contact
- Endpoint: https://benjamin-ghajiga-08d3f479.zappy5.app/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text)
  - `email` (email)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox)

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Benjamin Ghajiga
Benjamin Ghajiga is a versatile and accomplished Full-Stack Web Developer, Web3 Developer, and Video Editor based in Abuja, Nigeria, with 4+ years of experience delivering impactful digital solutions. He blends technical depth — spanning React, Node.js, Algorand, Cardano, and Solidity — with creative production skills in Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, and DaVinci Resolve. A hackathon winner (2025 Model and I Hackathon) and funded project contributor (Secuda on Cardano), Benjamin has a strong track record of taking products from concept to launch for startups, NGOs, and Web3 ecosystems. His brand communicates innovation, versatility, and a bold creative-technical identity.

## Target Audience
- Startups, NGOs, Web3 projects, businesses seeking full-stack development, blockchain solutions, and video production
- Blockchain Startups
- NGO Technology Leaders
- Web3 Enthusiasts
- Motion Design & Animation

## Industry
Web Development & Creative Technology
